name: Bombasm
description: Created a simple gamified experience for learning bitwise operations by converting one binary number to another using already set bitwise instructions. Collaborated on the frontend development using HTML, CSS, & JS, and assets development of the website using Figma.

name: UPDi Ko!
description: Collaborated in creating a locator map for locating services near UPV. Experienced in collaboration with a team of five and the software development cycle using Agile. Helped with working on the design using Figma and the frontend using ReactJS Library
